confidence_adjustments.signal_type: 52-week low breach for technically weak stocks
confidence_adjustments.reason: P001 scored RIGHT within 2 trading days — stocks within 3% of 52-week low with no earnings catalyst and FII selling pressure break the low faster than expected. Treat breach as base case, not tail risk.

P007 WRONG — created as counter to P001 on same day. Without confirmed positive earnings catalyst, institutional accumulation data, or technical reversal confirmation, do not bet against a 52-week low breach in FII-selling environment.

Iran formally rejected US 15-point ceasefire proposal March 25. Trump escalation threats. Brent still $111-115. No near-term resolution — all crude-linked bearish signals remain at maximum confidence.
Nifty India Defence +6% in March 2026 while Nifty -11%. DAC approved ₹79,000 crore procurement. HDFC Defence Fund +22%. Confirmed outperformance vs broader market.
Iran ceasefire rejection confirms continued fiscal squeeze. No government capex recovery catalyst visible. IRFC at 52-week low. Hold pattern confirmed.
FII selling consistent throughout March. -₹10,414 cr on March 23, -₹4,367 cr on March 27. No reversal signal. DII buying providing partial support only.

scored_predictions.prediction: SWIGGY will breach ₹260 (near 52-week low) within 4 weeks if no positive earnings catalyst
scored_predictions.evidence: SWIGGY closed at ₹259.25 on March 30, 2026 — the FY26 last trading day. Intraday low was ₹259.15. 52-week low ₹266.30 was breached. This occurred on Day 2 after the prediction was made (prediction date: March 28, breach date: March 30). Source: Business Standard price data March 30, 2026.

scored_predictions.prediction: SWIGGY will NOT breach ₹260 through April 18 check date; holds above ₹270 by April 18
scored_predictions.evidence: Directly negated by P001 outcome. SWIGGY at ₹259.25 on March 30. The ₹275.75 close referenced in the March 30 briefing file was an error — Business Standard confirms ₹259.25. The counter-prediction was made on the same day as the breach and proved incorrect within hours.
